character_dossiers.name: the stranger
character_dossiers.biography: A man waiting at the inn, interacting with the narrator, described as having a tallowy face and a cutlass. He attempts to manipulate the narrator and later shows fear.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: A man at the inn with a blue nose, startled by Black Dog, and later reeling from rum. He is described as having a commanding presence.

character_dossiers.name: Black Dog
character_dossiers.biography: A former pirate with a mutilated hand, described as confrontational and aggressive. He engages in a fight with the captain.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: The narrator, interacting with the stranger and witnessing the confrontation. He is described as uneasy and alarmed.

character_dossiers.name: Bill
character_dossiers.biography: Mentioned as the captain's name in the text, but treated as a separate character in the extraction data. His role is not explicitly defined.
